positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a fox embracing a potted celestial plant. The style is inspired by Art Nouveau meets modern vector art, rendered in rich teal, burnt orange, dusty rose, and deep navy. The fox has clean, symmetrical lines and elegant silhouette. The celestial plant glows softly, with geometric, crystalline petals. The composition is highly centralized and balanced, ideal for screen printing on fabric. Background is a simple, clean gradient wash of deep navy to teal. High contrast, perfect for a single, repeatable apparel print.
negative: low quality, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, poor anatomy, artifacts, grain, noise, messy lines, distracting elements, ugly, bad composition, bad hands, realistic photo
